violations.text: The hand-washing sink by the cafe bar was blocked by dishes within the sink basin. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Dishes were removed from the sink basin during the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/22/2025

Working containers of various dry ingredients are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. Containers were labeled during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/22/2025
Ceiling tiles in hallway area were observed in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/21/2024
